name: slaReport
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (path-3; NOT assassin-enumerated). RFPlanner OutagesTab sends FLAT params {windowDays,slaTargetPercent}; reads per-user outage ledger. availabilityPercent = round((1 - downtimeMs/windowMs)*1e5)/1e3; mttrHours = mean(resolvedAt-startedAt) or null when nothing resolved. RETURNS windowDays/slaTargetPercent/availabilityPercent/downtimeHours/incidents/openIncidents/mttrHours/slaMet/breachBudgetHours/bySeverity — the exact keys the SlaResult cards render. With no outages → 100% / slaMet true / mttr null. POISON: windowDays parseInt||30, slaTargetPercent via num() → finite defaults; availabilityPercent stays FINITE and <=100. State-backed (outages map). Pinned by server/tests/telecommunications-lens-macros.test.js.
